content.full_text:
[flOL ATTORNEYS:
BART WILLIAMS
MINNA WILLIAMS

MARYSVILLE OFFICE
320 Fourth Street
Marysville, CA 95901

WILLIAMS and WILLIAMS
A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
(916) 742-8242

May 6, 1992

John W. Wallace
California Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

RE: Mike Bluett

Dear Mr. Wallace:

You were kind enough to issue an opinion about the conflict
of interest problem for my client, Mike Bluett. He is now again
facing a problem in that he is applying for the position of fire
chief for OPUD (a Public Utilities District) and of course at the
same time he is running for supervisor in the same county in
which OPUD is located. His question is will this create a
conflict of interest situation even if he abstains from voting on
any financial matters relating to the district. Your cooperation
is greatly appreciated.

Very Truly Yours,

WILLIAMS & WILLIAMS

MINNA WILLIAMS

MW/ccw
cc: Mike Bluett
